evals.prompt: 把这个 Vite 项目发布成一个可以分享的临时网址。项目里有 pnpm-lock.yaml，dist 还没生成。
evals.expected_output: Inspect the declared build script, use pnpm, build the project, detect dist as the output, scan dist, run a DropHere guest deployment, verify the returned URL, and return the fixed handoff with verified evidence.
assertions: Reads package.json and uses pnpm build
Selects dist only after dist/index.html exists
Runs scan-sensitive-files.mjs against the exact dist path
Runs drophere doctor before drophere guest
Uses guest deployment without login
Runs verify-url.mjs against the returned URL
Returns Status, Provider, URL, Expires, Output, Upload, Verification, Claim, and Warnings in order

evals.prompt: Publish this plain HTML folder. It contains index.html, styles.css, and an .env file with a real API token.
evals.expected_output: Treat the folder as a possible static output, run the safety scan, stop at the blocked result, report only the sensitive path and rule, and keep all file values private. No public deployment is created.
assertions: Runs the scanner before any deployment command
Classifies .env as blocked
Keeps the token value out of output
Creates no guest deployment
Explains how to rebuild or prepare a clean public directory

evals.prompt: 给我一个 React 项目的预览链接，build 目录里带 main.js.map。
evals.expected_output: Detect build as the candidate output, report the source map as review-required, and pause for explicit approval or a source-map-free rebuild before upload.
assertions: Scans build before upload
Classifies main.js.map as review-required
Offers a clean rebuild or explicit acceptance path
Waits before drophere guest
Includes accepted source-map exposure in Warnings if the user later approves

evals.prompt: Deploy my Next.js app. The build finished and the only generated folder is .next; the app also has API routes.
evals.expected_output: Identify the artifact as a server build with runtime requirements, stop before upload, and explain that DropHere accepts a static export directory such as out containing index.html.
assertions: Rejects .next as an upload directory
Detects API routes as outside the static-hosting boundary
Creates no public deployment
Explains the static export requirement
Avoids changing application architecture without user direction

evals.prompt: DropHere returned a URL, but the page loads with missing JavaScript files. Finish the deployment check.
evals.expected_output: Verify the returned DropHere URL and same-origin assets, report degraded or failed with concrete asset paths and counts, inspect the framework base path, and keep the URL in the handoff for inspection.
assertions: Runs verify-url.mjs on the returned drophere.page URL
Reports failed asset paths without response bodies
Avoids a verified status while assets fail
Suggests correcting the build base path and rebuilding
Keeps the public URL in the fixed handoff

evals.prompt: 先帮我看看这个 Astro 项目能不能用 DropHere 发，暂时不要发布。
evals.expected_output: Perform local inspection, identify dist and the build command, run local detection and safety checks when an output exists, and report readiness without creating an external deployment.
assertions: Recognizes the request as local assessment only
Identifies Astro dist output
Performs no drophere guest call
Returns a concise readiness result and the next publish command
